message:
Command `# No VERILOG_FILES in step 36 env. Good.
# Check what the io.tcl read_pnr_libs reads in this context
# The io.tcl sets _PNR_LIBS from the Python wrapper - but here it's run standalone by LibreLane
# so LibreLane sets _PNR_LIBS in the environment before calling OpenROAD.

# Let's look at the step 36 _env.tcl for lib paths
grep "LIB\|EXTRA_LIB\|MACRO_LIB\|DEFAULT_CORNER" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/36-openroad-checkantennas-1/_env.tcl | grep "^set" | head -10` executed with exit code 0.

set ::env(STD_CELL_LIBRARY) sky130_fd_sc_hd
set ::env(DEFAULT_CORNER) nom_tt_025C_1v80
set ::env(LIB) "\"*_tt_025C_1v80\" /nc/apps/pdk/ciel/sky130/versions/0fe599b2afb6708d281543108caf8310912f54af/sky130A/libs.ref/sky130_fd_sc_hd/lib/sky130_fd_sc_hd__tt_025C_1v80.lib \"*_ss_100C_1v60\" /nc/apps/pdk/ciel/sky130/versions/0fe599b2afb6708d281543108caf8310912f54af/sky130A/libs.ref/sky130_fd_sc_hd/lib/sky130_fd_sc_hd__ss_100C_1v60.lib \"*_ff_n40C_1v95\" /nc/apps/pdk/ciel/sky130/versions/0fe599b2afb6708d281543108caf8310912f54af/sky130A/libs.ref/sky130_fd_sc_hd/lib/sky130_fd_sc_hd__ff_n40C_1v95.lib"
set ::env(EXTRA_LIBS) "/nc/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/v2.2.0-nc/lib/CF_SRAM_1024x32_ff_195V_100C.lib /nc/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/v2.2.0-nc/lib/CF_SRAM_1024x32_ss_160V_100C.lib /nc/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/v2.2.0-nc/lib/CF_SRAM_1024x32_tt_180V_25C.lib"

# so LibreLane sets _PNR_LIBS in the environment before calling OpenROAD.
